fields.name: Sell-to Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer that you shipped the items on the credit memo to.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posted credit memo number.

fields.name: Bill-to Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer that you send or sent the credit memo to.

fields.name: Bill-to Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer that the credit memo was sent to.

fields.name: Bill-to Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name of the customer that you send or sent the credit memo to.

fields.name: Bill-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address of the customer that the credit memo was sent to.

fields.name: Bill-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional address information.

fields.name: Bill-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the customer on the sales document.

fields.name: Bill-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact person at the customer's billing address.

fields.name: Your Reference
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's reference. The contents will be printed on sales documents.

fields.name: Ship-to Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for an alternate shipment address if you want to ship to another address than the one that has been entered automatically. This field is also used in case of drop shipment.

fields.name: Ship-to Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer that the items were shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name of the customer that the items were shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address that the items were shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional address information.

fields.name: Ship-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the customer on the sales document.

fields.name: Ship-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact person at the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which the credit memo was posted.

fields.name: Posting Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies any text that is entered to accompany the posting, for example for information to auditors.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which the shipment is due for payment.

fields.name: Shipment Method Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shipment method for the shipment.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location where the credit memo was registered.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Customer Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's market type to link business transactions to.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency code of the credit memo.

fields.name: Salesperson Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which salesperson is associated with the credit memo.

fields.name: No. Printed
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many times the document has been printed.

fields.name: Applies-to Doc. Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the posted document that this document or journal line will be applied to when you post, for example to register payment.

fields.name: Applies-to Doc. No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the posted document that this document or journal line will be applied to when you post, for example to register payment.

fields.name: Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the amounts on all the credit memo lines, in the currency of the credit memo. The amount does not include VAT.

fields.name: Amount Including VAT
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the amounts, including VAT, on all the lines on the document.

fields.name: VAT Registration No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's VAT registration number for customers.

fields.name: EU 3-Party Trade
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the invoice was part of an EU 3-party trade transaction.

fields.name: Sell-to Customer Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of customer at the sell-to address.

fields.name: Sell-to Customer Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name of the customer who will receive the products and be billed by default.

fields.name: Sell-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address of the customer that the items on the credit memo were sent to.

fields.name: Sell-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional address information.

fields.name: Sell-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the customer on the sales document.

fields.name: Sell-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the person to contact when you communicate with the customer who you shipped the items on the credit memo to.

fields.name: Bill-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code.

fields.name: Bill-to County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the state, province or county as a part of the address.

fields.name: Bill-to Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region code of the customer's billing address.

fields.name: Sell-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code.

fields.name: Sell-to County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the state, province or county as a part of the address.

fields.name: Sell-to Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region code of the customer's main address.

fields.name: Ship-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code.

fields.name: Ship-to County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the state, province or county as a part of the address.

fields.name: Ship-to Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region code of the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Correction
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry was posted as a corrective entry.

fields.name: Document Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the related document was created.

fields.name: External Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the external document number that is entered on the sales header that this line was posted from.

fields.name: Payment Method Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's method of payment. The program has copied the code from the Payment Method Code field on the sales header.

fields.name: Shipping Agent Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which shipping agent is used to transport the items on the sales document to the customer.

fields.name: Package Tracking No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shipping agent's package number.

fields.name: Pre-Assigned No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the credit memo that the posted credit memo was created from.

fields.name: Tax Area Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the tax area that is used to calculate and post sales tax.

fields.name: Tax Liable
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the customer or vendor is liable for sales tax.

fields.name: Company Bank Account Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bank account to use for bank information when the document is printed.

fields.name: VAT Reporting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT date on the invoice.

fields.name: Ship-to Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the telephone number of the company's shipping address.

fields.name: Document Exchange Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the document if you are using a document exchange service to send it as an electronic document. The status values are reported by the document exchange service.

fields.name: Paid
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the posted sales invoice that relates to this sales credit memo is paid.

fields.name: Remaining Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that remains to be paid for the posted sales invoice.

fields.name: Cancelled
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the posted sales invoice that relates to this sales credit memo has been either corrected or canceled.

fields.name: Corrective
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the posted sales invoice has been either corrected or canceled by this sales credit memo.

fields.name: Sell-to Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the contact at the customer who handles the credit memo.

fields.name: Bill-to Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the contact at the customer who handles the credit memo.

fields.name: Responsibility Center
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the responsibility center that serves the customer on this sales document.

fields.name: Shipping Agent Service Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which shipping agent service is used to transport the items on the sales document to the customer.
